tests.title: Authorization code grant returns a typed token response
tests.given: An authorization code, client ID and redirect URI
tests.then: A grant_type=authorization_code form POST carrying code and redirect_uri is sent and a typed TokenResponse is returned

tests.title: GenerateCodeVerifier produces a 43-128 char unreserved string
tests.given: A request for a PKCE code verifier
tests.then: A cryptographically random verifier of 43-128 characters drawn only from the unreserved set [A-Za-z0-9-._~] is returned

tests.title: S256Challenge equals BASE64URL(SHA256(verifier))
tests.given: The RFC 7636 Appendix B code verifier
tests.then: The result exactly matches the Appendix B expected challenge E9Melhoa2OwvFrEMTJguCHaoeK1t8URWbuGJSstw-cM

tests.title: WithCodeVerifier sends the code_verifier parameter
tests.given: WithCodeVerifier(verifier) on an authorization code exchange
tests.then: The request body carries the code_verifier form parameter

tests.title: Authorization code error response is parsed into a typed TokenError
tests.given: A token endpoint that rejects the code with an OAuth error body
tests.then: A typed TokenError carrying error/error_description/error_uri is returned (shared error path)

tests.title: PKCE round-trip against a live provider
tests.given: A live provider and an S256 challenge derived from a generated verifier
tests.when: An authorization code obtained for that challenge is exchanged with WithCodeVerifier
tests.then: The provider accepts the verifier and issues tokens (integration)
